description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Development that runs on a workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on push events to all branches except release/**. The workflow should have a job named build running on a docker environment with write permissions for ID token and repository contents. The job should clean the Docker environment, checkout the specified commit or tag, configure AWS credentials, login to AWS and GCP registries, build Docker images with a specific tag, and push the images to both AWS and GCP registries.
